# Index — capabilities
<!-- GENERATED by kb-render.sh — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. -->

- [A2A messaging node](./a2a-node.md) — `capability` — The a2a workflow node — send a message from a workflow to another project's agent; replies collected via await-signal(source=a2a)
- [Coding-agent session nodes](./agent-session-nodes.md) — `capability` — The custom worker nodes that start, prompt, read, and stop a coding-agent session inside a workflow
- [Async session→task completion bridge](./async-session-task-bridge.md) — `capability` — Completes a parked Conductor task when a runtime coding session reports turn-completion or close
- [collect-result node](./collect-result-node.md) — `capability` — Workflow node that harvests a completed session's result artifacts for downstream workflow steps
- [Workflow definition secret refs](./definition-secret-refs.md) — `capability` — Declare a definition's secret dependencies as refs into secret_store; resolved (not embedded) at execution time
- [Git open-PR node](./git-open-pr-node.md) — `capability` — The one privileged git Conductor node — opens a GitHub PR via an org-installed App token; all other git ops stay in the coding-agent session
- [Human approval gate](./human-approval-gate.md) — `capability` — Durable human-in-the-loop gate: a parked request-approval node plus the decision endpoint that resumes it
- [LLM node (runtime-less)](./llm-node.md) — `capability` — The llm Conductor node — one Anthropic call to summarize/structure/classify workflow data, no container
- [send-notification node](./notification-node.md) — `capability` — Workflow node that emits a durable in-app notification, or delivers to an external channel via a per-stack sender
- [Resolve-projects fan-out node](./resolve-projects-node.md) — `capability` — Expands a workspace into its project array so a downstream Conductor FORK_JOIN_DYNAMIC can fan an agent across every repo
- [Run-command node](./run-command-node.md) — `capability` — Deterministic shell exec in a target runtime; returns exit code + output so a downstream SWITCH can branch on success
- [Runtime lifecycle nodes](./runtime-lifecycle-nodes.md) — `capability` — The runtime-start / runtime-status / runtime-stop worker nodes a workflow references to provision, read, and release a container runtime
- [Scheduled workflows](./scheduled-workflows.md) — `capability` — A background cron scheduler that fires due workflow definitions exactly-once as system-originated, tenant-scoped runs
- [Signal wait & unpark (Model-B)](./signal-wait-and-unpark.md) — `capability` — The await-signal node parks a workflow task on a minted correlation_id; POST /api/v1/signals unparks it — the general wait-for-an-external-decision primitive.
- [Webhook triggers](./webhook-triggers.md) — `capability` — Public token-authed endpoint that starts a run of a webhook's bound published definition; tenant + definition come from the stored row, never the request
- [Workflow definition registry](./workflow-definition-registry.md) — `capability` — Scoped CRUD + clone + publish for workflow definitions; PS DB is canonical, Conductor is a publish-time derived cache
- [Workflow execution API](./workflow-execution-api.md) — `capability` — Start a workflow execution from a definition, read its status, and list the company's executions — tenant-scoped, with idempotent start
- [Workflow inbox](./workflow-inbox.md) — `capability` — Level-scoped read roll-up of pending human approvals + in-app notifications, consumed by ps-ui to render an inbox
- [Workflow task catalog](./workflow-task-catalog.md) — `capability` — Deployment-static, authenticated-but-tenant-blind catalog of every node/task type — schemas, typed handles, live gating — for the ps-ui v2 visual workflow builder
